title: Gaussian Elimination
summary: Solve systems of linear equations using row operations, row echelon form, and back-substitution.
content_html:
System of Linear Equations

A system of m equations in n unknowns can be written as Ax = b where A is the coefficient matrix, x the unknown vector, b the constants.

Augmented Matrix

Combine A and b into [A|b]:

x + 2y + z  = 3    [1  2  1 | 3]
2x + 5y + 3z = 8  → [2  5  3 | 8]
x + 3y + 4z  = 7    [1  3  4 | 7]

Elementary Row Operations

  • Rᵢ ↔ Rⱼ: Swap rows i and j.
  • kRᵢ → Rᵢ: Multiply row i by non-zero scalar k.
  • Rᵢ + kRⱼ → Rᵢ: Add k times row j to row i.

Row Echelon Form (REF)

A matrix is in REF when:

  • All zero rows are at the bottom.
  • Each row's first non-zero entry (pivot) is to the right of the pivot in the row above.

Reduced Row Echelon Form (RREF)

Additionally, each pivot is 1 and all other entries in the pivot column are 0.

Worked Example — Unique Solution

[1  2  1 | 3]   R2-2R1  [1  2  1 | 3]
[2  5  3 | 8] ────────→ [0  1  1 | 2]
[1  3  4 | 7]   R3-R1   [0  1  3 | 4]

R3-R2→  [1  2  1 | 3]
        [0  1  1 | 2]
        [0  0  2 | 2]  → z = 1

Back-substitute: z=1 → y = 2-1 = 1 → x = 3-2(1)-1 = 0
Solution: x=0, y=1, z=1

Types of Solutions

  • Unique solution: Pivot in every variable column. Consistent system.
  • Infinitely many solutions: Free variables (fewer pivots than variables). Underdetermined.
  • No solution: Row of form [0 0 ... 0 | c] where c≠0. Inconsistent system.

Example — No Solution

[1  1 | 2]  R2-2R1→  [1  1 | 2]
[2  2 | 5]           [0  0 | 1] ← IMPOSSIBLE (0=1)
→ No solution exists

exercises.title: REF pivot property
exercises.prompt: In Row Echelon Form, each pivot must be:
options: To the right of the pivot in the row above
exercises.answer: To the right of the pivot in the row above

exercises.answer: Adding a multiple of one row to another

exercises.title: Free variables
exercises.prompt: If a system has more variables than pivot columns, there are:

exercises.title: Elementary row ops preserve
options: The solution set of the system
exercises.answer: The solution set of the system

exercises.title: RREF additional requirement
options: Each pivot is 1 and it's the only non-zero in its column
Pivots are in the first column
exercises.answer: Each pivot is 1 and it's the only non-zero in its column
